_comment: Tier-2 for Kratos linear_elasticity#2: SubModelPart names are case-sensitive. ModelPart.GetSubModelPart('inlet') raises RuntimeError when the actual name is 'Inlet'. The diagnostic comes from ModelPart::ErrorNonExistingSubModelPart in kratos/sources/model_part.cpp. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 — fixture turns the one-shot probe into a regression check.
expect_in_output: no sub model part with name
